name: hot-cross-buns-2
description: Electron-first rebuild of Hot Cross Buns.
author: gongahkia

scripts.pack:mac:preview: pnpm build:release:mac && tsx scripts/electron-builder-preview.ts --mac --publish never && pnpm release:mac-artifacts && pnpm release:checksums
scripts.pack:linux:preview: pnpm build:release:linux && tsx scripts/electron-builder-preview.ts --linux AppImage --publish never && pnpm release:linux-artifacts && pnpm release:checksums
scripts.pack:win:preview: pnpm build:release:win && tsx scripts/electron-builder-preview.ts --win nsis --x64 --publish never && pnpm release:win-artifacts && pnpm release:checksums
scripts.release:mac:preview: pnpm test && pnpm build:release:mac && pnpm release:review-bundle && tsx scripts/electron-builder-preview.ts --mac --publish never && pnpm release:mac-artifacts && pnpm release:checksums
scripts.release:linux:preview: pnpm test && pnpm build:release:linux && pnpm release:review-bundle && tsx scripts/electron-builder-preview.ts --linux AppImage --publish never && pnpm release:linux-artifacts && pnpm release:checksums
scripts.release:win:preview: pnpm test && pnpm build:release:win && pnpm release:review-bundle && tsx scripts/electron-builder-preview.ts --win nsis --x64 --publish never && pnpm release:win-artifacts && pnpm release:checksums
